actor_claims.quote_text: On September 19, 2013, the Special Committee held an in-person meeting.
representatives from BofA Merrill Lynch and Goodwin Procter
representatives from BofA Merrill Lynch and Goodwin Procter

actor_relation_claims.quote_text: CSC, Pamplona and Mac-Gray executed the exclusivity agreement
CSC, Pamplona and Mac-Gray executed the exclusivity agreement
Pamplona was committed to provide 100% of the capital required to consummate the transaction
actor_relation_claims.role_detail: committed to provide 100% of the capital required

bid_claims.quote_text: On September 18, 2013, CSC/Pamplona submitted a proposal for an all-cash purchase price of $20.75 per share

Party A reiterated in a telephone call to a representative of BofA Merrill Lynch that its previous indication of interest with an all-cash purchase price of $18.00 to $19.00 per share was its best and final offer.

On September 18, 2013, Party B also submitted a revised indication of interest with a purchase price that Party B valued at $21.50 per share, including $19.00 of cash to be paid at closing and the remaining per share price to be paid in the form of options to be issued to Mac-Gray stockholders
CSC/Pamplona were willing to increase their all-cash purchase price to $21.25 per share as a last and best offer
the all-cash per share purchase price of $21.25, we refer to as the CSC/Pamplona final proposal

coverage_results.reason: The window begins with September 18, 2013 revised/final indications and later exclusivity negotiations, but does not describe initiation of the sale process.
The window does not provide a bidder count at the initial indication-of-interest stage.
The window does not provide a bidder count at the first-round stage.

event_claims.description: CSC/Pamplona submitted a proposal for an all-cash purchase price of $20.75 per share.
event_claims.quote_text: On September 18, 2013, CSC/Pamplona submitted a proposal for an all-cash purchase price of $20.75 per share

event_claims.description: Party A reiterated that its previous all-cash indication of interest of $18.00 to $19.00 per share was its best and final offer.
event_claims.quote_text: Also on September 18, 2013, Party A reiterated in a telephone call to a representative of BofA Merrill Lynch that its previous indication of interest with an all-cash purchase price of $18.00 to $19.00 per share was its best and final offer.

event_claims.description: Party B submitted a revised indication of interest valued at $21.50 per share.
event_claims.quote_text: On September 18, 2013, Party B also submitted a revised indication of interest with a purchase price that Party B valued at $21.50 per share

event_claims.description: Party C did not submit a revised indication of interest or reiterate its prior indication of interest.
event_claims.quote_text: Party C did not submit a revised indication of interest or reiterate its prior indication of interest of an all-cash purchase price of $16.00 to $17.00 per share

event_claims.description: The Special Committee authorized Mac-Gray to enter into an exclusivity agreement with exclusive negotiations until 5 p.m. ET on October 12, 2013.
event_claims.quote_text: After discussion, the Special Committee authorized Mac-Gray to enter into an exclusivity agreement providing for exclusive negotiations until 5 p.m. ET on October 12, 2013 on the terms included in the CSC/Pamplona final proposal

event_claims.description: CSC, Pamplona and Mac-Gray executed the exclusivity agreement providing for exclusive negotiations until 5 p.m. ET on October 12, 2013.
event_claims.quote_text: On September 24, 2013, CSC, Pamplona and Mac-Gray executed the exclusivity agreement providing for exclusive negotiations until 5 p.m. ET on October 12, 2013
